detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MIGHTY._transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (MIGHTY.sol#661-729):
	External calls:
	- swapBack() (MIGHTY.sol#697)
		- router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(amountToSwap,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (MIGHTY.sol#643-655)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _balances[sender] = _balances[sender].sub(amount,Insufficient Balance) (MIGHTY.sol#703-709)
	MIGHTY._balances (MIGHTY.sol#397) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MIGHTY._basicTransfer(address,address,uint256) (MIGHTY.sol#733-757)
	- MIGHTY._transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (MIGHTY.sol#661-729)
	- MIGHTY.balanceOf(address) (MIGHTY.sol#495-499)
	- MIGHTY.constructor() (MIGHTY.sol#441-459)
	- MIGHTY.shouldSwapBack() (MIGHTY.sol#503-515)
	- MIGHTY.takeFee(address,uint256) (MIGHTY.sol#607-623)
	- _balances[recipient] = _balances[recipient].add(amountReceived) (MIGHTY.sol#721)
	MIGHTY._balances (MIGHTY.sol#397) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MIGHTY._basicTransfer(address,address,uint256) (MIGHTY.sol#733-757)
	- MIGHTY._transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (MIGHTY.sol#661-729)
	- MIGHTY.balanceOf(address) (MIGHTY.sol#495-499)
	- MIGHTY.constructor() (MIGHTY.sol#441-459)
	- MIGHTY.shouldSwapBack() (MIGHTY.sol#503-515)
	- MIGHTY.takeFee(address,uint256) (MIGHTY.sol#607-623)
	- amountReceived = takeFee(sender,amount) (MIGHTY.sol#713-717)
		- _balances[address(this)] = _balances[address(this)].add(feeAmount) (MIGHTY.sol#617)
	MIGHTY._balances (MIGHTY.sol#397) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MIGHTY._basicTransfer(address,address,uint256) (MIGHTY.sol#733-757)
	- MIGHTY._transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (MIGHTY.sol#661-729)
	- MIGHTY.balanceOf(address) (MIGHTY.sol#495-499)
	- MIGHTY.constructor() (MIGHTY.sol#441-459)
	- MIGHTY.shouldSwapBack() (MIGHTY.sol#503-515)
	- MIGHTY.takeFee(address,uint256) (MIGHTY.sol#607-623)

detectors.description: MIGHTY.addLiquidityETH() (MIGHTY.sol#761-779) ignores return value by router.addLiquidityETH{value: msg.value}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (MIGHTY.sol#773)

MIGHTY.setTaxReceiver(address)._receiver (MIGHTY.sol#783) lacks a zero-check on :
		- taxReceiver = _receiver (MIGHTY.sol#785)

Reentrancy in MIGHTY.addLiquidityETH() (MIGHTY.sol#761-779):
	External calls:
	- pair = IUniswapV2Factory(router.factory()).createPair(router.WETH(),address(this)) (MIGHTY.sol#763-769)
	- router.addLiquidityETH{value: msg.value}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (MIGHTY.sol#773)
	External calls sending eth:
	- router.addLiquidityETH{value: msg.value}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (MIGHTY.sol#773)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- swapEnabled = true (MIGHTY.sol#777)

	- [router.addLiquidityETH{value: msg.value}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](MIGHTY.sol#L773)
	External calls sending eth:

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MIGHTY._transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (MIGHTY.sol#661-729):
	External calls:
	- swapBack() (MIGHTY.sol#697)
		- router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(amountToSwap,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (MIGHTY.sol#643-655)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(sender,address(this),feeAmount) (MIGHTY.sol#619)
		- amountReceived = takeFee(sender,amount) (MIGHTY.sol#713-717)
	- Transfer(sender,recipient,amountReceived) (MIGHTY.sol#725)

	External calls:

		- [router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(amountToSwap,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](MIGHTY.sol#L643-L655)
